author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added 6 property tests for the missing integer NpyElement impls: prop_npy_u16_roundtrip, prop_npy_u32_roundtrip, prop_npy_u64_roundtrip, prop_npy_u128_roundtrip, prop_npy_i16_roundtrip, prop_npy_i128_roundtrip. Pattern matches existing u8/i32/i64 props: any::<T>() across 0..=100 elements, 256 proptest cases per type.

ferray-io property tests: 12 -> 18, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 1eb05cf9.
